summary: Iteration 111: Family Account Feature VERIFIED. 12/12 backend tests passed. All family account endpoints working: license type change to honorary_fa, family member CRUD, projections with daily profit calculation, simulate view includes family_members array, independent profit calculation for each family member, validation for non-honorary_fa users (400) and 5-member limit, admin habits CRUD regression passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ POST /api/admin/licenses/{id}/change-type correctly converts license to honorary_fa and updates user.license_type
✅ GET /api/admin/family/members/{user_id} returns family members with calculated account_value and profit
✅ POST /api/admin/family/members/{user_id} creates family member with starting_amount and effective_start_date
✅ GET /api/admin/family/members/{user_id}/{member_id}/projections returns daily projections with all required fields
✅ GET /api/admin/members/{user_id}/simulate includes family_members array for honorary_fa users
✅ Family member profit calculation is independent (Maria: $2489.60 from $2000 start)
✅ Non-honorary_fa users correctly rejected with 400 error
✅ 5-member limit validation exists in code (lines 545-549 in family.py)
✅ Admin habits CRUD endpoints still working (regression passed)
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ prefixed family member during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Family Account feature fully verified. Rizza Miles (honorary_fa) has 2+ family members. Maria Miles' account_value=$2489.60 (16 trading days with quarterly compounding from $2000 start on 2026-01-25). Projections endpoint returns all required fields: date, start_value, account_value, lot_size, daily_profit, manager_traded. Admin habits require 'title' field not 'name'.

verified_features.verification: Returns family members with account_value=$2489.60 and profit=$489.60 for Maria
Successfully creates family member with starting_amount and effective_start_date
278 projections, 16 trading days with manager_traded=true, all required fields present
Returns family_members array with 2+ members for honorary_fa user
Maria ($2489.60 from $2000) calculates independently from parent
Limit validation exists in code (max 5 family members)
